Catalog/Diagnostics/Drug of Abuse (DOA) Rapid Test - Opiates 2000ng/ml
DiagnosticsREF: DASKOP-02

Drug of Abuse (DOA) Rapid Test - Opiates 2000ng/ml

MeriScreen · Drug Testing

Competitive lateral flow chromatographic immunoassay for qualitative detection of drugs in urine. Available in dip test and cassette formats. 20 drug targets with varying cutoff concentrations.

MaterialImmunochromatographic test strip
Frequently Asked Questions

MERISCREEN DOA Rapid Test for Opiates delivers accurate drug screening results in just 5 minutes using lateral flow immunoassay technology. This immunochromatographic test strip features a 2000ng/ml cutoff level for reliable opiate detection in urine specimens. Available in both dip test and cassette formats, this diagnostic solution enables healthcare facilities to conduct efficient workplace and clinical drug testing with professional-grade accuracy.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Drug of Abuse (DOA) Rapid Test - Opiates 2000ng/ml, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Drug of Abuse (DOA) Rapid Test - Opiates 2000ng/ml is constructed using Immunochromatographic test strip, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
